description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a deep, boxy silhouette and a luxurious, diamond-tufted upholstery pattern covering all visible surfaces, including the seat, backrest, and armrests. The sofa is upholstered in a sleek, black material that appears to be either leather or high-quality faux leather, giving it a sophisticated and urban look. The armrests and backrest are of equal height, creating a uniform, enclosed seating area with a low profile. The seat is wide and flat, with the tufting providing both visual interest and a plush, cushioned appearance. The sofa stands on four short, exposed wooden legs with a dark finish, slightly elevating the frame above the ground. This piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or modern public spaces.
description: A black, diamond-tufted, boxy sofa with matching armrests and backrest, set on short wooden legs. The upholstery is sleek and luxurious, giving it a modern, urban appeal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the sofa, highlighting the diamond-tufted seat, backrest, and armrests, as well as the four short wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the sofa, the thick armrest, and the continuous tufted pattern wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the uninterrupted, diamond-tufted backrest and the sofa's rectangular shape, with all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the armrest's thickness and the sofa's deep, boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions with uniform diamond-tufted pattern; all cushions appear attached and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, straight, and boxy, matching the height of the backrest; they are thick, fully padded, and feature the same diamond-tufted upholstery as the rest of the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, exposed legs positioned at the corners; legs are straight, slightly tapered, and have a dark wooden finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with attached, diamond-tufted upholstery; matches the height and style of the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Diamond-tufted pattern covers all visible surfaces, creating a quilted, textured appearance; upholstery is solid black with no additional decorative stitching.
